title: Mutta Kalakki Lyrics From Youth | Ken Karunaas | GV Prakash Kumar

sections.intro: Get ready to groove to Mutta Kalakki, the high-energy youth anthem from the movie Youth. Composed by the hit-maker GV Prakash Kumar and performed with infectious energy by Ken Karunaas, this track is a perfect blend of local 'gaana' vibes and modern beats. Featuring Suraj Venjaramoodu, the music video is a visual treat for fans of quirky, mass entertainers.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • The term 'Mutta Kalakki' refers to a popular street-food egg dish in Tamil Nadu, used here as a metaphor for the protagonist's heart being 'scrambled' by love.
  • Ken Karunaas, the lead, is the son of famous actor/singer Karunaas. His vocal style and body language in this song pay a direct tribute to his father's iconic 'Gaana' hits from the 2000s.
  • GV Prakash Kumar used a 'Thappaattam' rhythm section layered with electronic bass to ensure the song works for both local festivals and modern club settings.
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the singer of Mutta Kalakki?

The song is performed by Ken Karunaas, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the movie Youth (2025) about?

The movie 'Youth' is a coming-of-age drama starring Ken Karunaas and Suraj Venjaramoodu, focusing on the struggles and aspirations of the modern generation.

tamilStanzas:
ஏ மஞ்ச பலூனு நீ சூப்பர் சலூனு
ஹே வாடி கூலிங் வாட்டர்மெலனு
என் பியூட்டி பபூனு ஏ பாடி கோலோனு
ஏ உன்னால என் லைப் சுக்குனு

நைட்டானா கனவுல வாருது ஏன்
பிரைட்டானா யோசிக்கிறேன் உன்ன பத்தியே
மண்டையில படிப்பொன்னும் ஏறலைடி
அழகுல உன்ன மிஞ்ச ஆள் இல்லையடி

மினுக்கி நீதான் என் நெஞ்ச குலுக்கி
சிறுக்கி வாடி என் முட்ட கலக்கி
அழகி போகாத ரொம்ப விலகி
சிலுங்கி போறாளே என்ன முழுங்கி

மனசு ஃபுல்லா உன் மேல தான்
திருந்தி போனேன் உன்னால தான்
திரியுறேன் உன் பின்னால தான்
ஓகே சொல்லு கண்ணால தான்

புதுசா பொறந்த ஃபீலிங்மா
சிரிச்சா ஹார்ட் ஹீலிங்மா
கனக்கா லவ் காலிங்மா
என்ன லெஃப்ட் ஹேண்ட்ல டீலிங் பண்ணாதம்மா

மினுக்கி நீதான் என் நெஞ்ச குலுக்கி
சிறுக்கி வாடி என் முட்ட கலக்கி
அழகி போகாத ரொம்ப விலகி
சிலுங்கி போறாளே என்ன முழுங்கி
englishStanzas:
Ae manja baloon-u nee super saloon-u Hey vaadi cooling watermelan-u

[Hey yellow balloon, you're a super salon; come here, my cool watermelon!]


En beauty buffoon-u ae body colon-u Ae unnaala en life sukkun-u

[My beauty buffoon, my body cologne; my life has become shattered because of you.]


Night-aanaa kanavula vaarudhu yen Bright-aanaa yosikkiraen unna pathiyae

[Why do you come in my dreams at night? I think about you brightly all the time.]


Mandaiyila padipponnum aeralaidi Azhaula unna minja aal illaiyaedi

[Studies won't go into my head; there is no one to beat you in beauty, girl.]


Minikki needhaan en nenja kulukki Sirukki vaadi yen mutta kalakki

[You are the shiny one who shook my heart; come here, girl, you've stirred my heart like an egg (Mutta Kalakki).]


Manasu full-aa un maela dhaan Thirundhi ponaen unnaala dhaan

[My whole heart is on you; I've changed for the better because of you.]


Pudhusa porandha feeling-maa Sirichaa heart healing-maa Enna left-hand la dealing pannaadhammaa

[It's a feeling of being reborn; your smile heals my heart; don't dismiss me so easily (left-hand dealing).]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mutta Kalakki'?

'Mutta Kalakki' is a lively song that celebrates youth and the joy of living, filled with playful lyrics and energetic beats.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Youth'?

In Youth, this song reflects the carefree spirit of the characters as they navigate through their vibrant lives and relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ken Karunaas and composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was 'Mutta Kalakki' released?

'Mutta Kalakki' was released on February 12, 2026.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Mutta Kalakki', the exuberance of youth is vividly portrayed through lively lyrics and an upbeat melody. The song captures the carefree spirit of the characters in Youth, celebrating their adventures and the joy of living. With its infectious rhythm, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy, making it perfect for parties and celebrations. This track is a testament to the vibrant essence of youth and the thrill of life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mutta Kalakki from Youth is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Ken Karunaas's dynamic vocals and GV Prakash Kumar's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into a world of fun and energy with this catchy tune that celebrates life and joy!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, you are like a super salon, cooling like a watermelon. You are my beauty, my body is yours. Because of you, my life is enjoyable.
In my dreams at night, I think about you. I studied your face, and it makes me smile. No one else can make me cry like you do.
You are the one who makes my heart flutter. You are my joy, my beautiful one. It's hard to let you go, and I feel lost without you.
My heart is completely yours. I have changed because of you. I can't move on without you. Just say okay, and I will follow you.
Is this a new feeling that has come? Is my heart healing because of your smile? Is love calling me? What should I do with my left hand?
You are the one who makes my heart flutter. You are my joy, my beautiful one. It's hard to let you go, and I feel lost without you.
